summary_line: Omaha-based personality-led national wealth management firm — $50.6B AUM, 1,416 employees, 472 advisors, 0 DRPs. Founded and led by Ron Carson (industry personality + author). Second-largest firm in the catalog by AUM (after Mercer at $84.4B). Site capture returned 403 Forbidden (bot-blocked); analysis relies on IAPD + public knowledge. Known for major content brand and active acquisition pipeline.
